featureType.name: TRB_KEEN_ObsData_Cover
featureType.title: Kelp Ecosystem Ecology Network - Observational data - % cover algae & sessile invertebrates
featureType.abstract:
Observational data for the Kelp Ecosystem Ecology Network. These data come from transects of rocky reefs taken around the world using the KEEN observational data protocol (see https://kelpecosystems.org for full description of methods and handbook). The KEEN observational data consists of the following components: site information, fish observations, quadrat sampling, band transect sampling, and percent cover from uniform point counts.
This layer is for the PERCENT COVER data, with locations joined from the SITE data.
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]
